name: social-media-post
description: Create viral social media posts for Instagram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Facebook with hooks and hashtags
logic: Step 1: Check for brand-voice.md in current directory or skills folder.
Step 2: Load platform-specific constraints from core/global-constraints.json.
Step 3: Select 3 distinct marketing triggers from core/marketing-triggers.json.
Step 4: Generate 3 distinct variations (Professional, Edgy, Minimalist).
Step 5: For each variation, include Hook, Post Body, CTA, Hashtags, and Posting Time.
Step 6: Finalize with a Psychology Breakdown including the Trigger and Why it works.

parameter_validation.platform: Must be one of: Instagram, Twitter-X, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok
parameter_validation.topic: The main subject of the post
parameter_validation.tone: Optional - used only if brand-voice.md is missing
